name: astro-parallel-docs
description: Shared Astro theme for bilingual (original/translation) side-by-side documentation sites. Consumed as a git submodule; reads each site's site.config.mjs via the @config alias.

scripts.preview: npm run preview:link && astro dev --root example --host
scripts.preview:build: npm run preview:link && astro build --root example
scripts.preview:serve: npm run preview:build && astro preview --root example --host

//devDependencies: Dev-only: lets this repo preview example/ in place (npm run preview). Consuming sites install their own copy via deps.json — see README.
